'''âj-y-d''' ('''jayada''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:luteinize|luteinize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-y-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:luteinize|luteinize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âj-y-d
|-
! Lemma
| jayada
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:jayadithi|jayadithi]] || [[word:jayadiji|jayadiji]] || [[word:jayadishi|jayadishi]] || [[word:jayadi|jayadi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:jayaduthuth|jayaduthuth]] || [[word:jayadujuj|jayadujuj]] || [[word:jayadushush|jayadushush]] || [[word:jayad|jayad]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:jayaduthu|jayaduthu]] || [[word:jayaduju|jayaduju]] || [[word:jayadushu|jayadushu]] || [[word:jayadu|jayadu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:jayadufuth|jayadufuth]] || [[word:jayadufuj|jayadufuj]] || [[word:jayadufush|jayadufush]] || [[word:jayaduf|jayaduf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:jayadethe|jayadethe]] || [[word:jayadeje|jayadeje]] || [[word:jayadeshe|jayadeshe]] || [[word:jayade|jayade]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:jayadothoth|jayadothoth]] || [[word:jayadojoj|jayadojoj]] || [[word:jayadoshosh|jayadoshosh]] || [[word:jayad|jayad]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:jayadotho|jayadotho]] || [[word:jayadojo|jayadojo]] || [[word:jayadosho|jayadosho]] || [[word:jayado|jayado]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:jayadofoth|jayadofoth]] || [[word:jayadofoj|jayadofoj]] || [[word:jayadofosh|jayadofosh]] || [[word:jayadof|jayadof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:jayadĂŠthĂŠ|jayadĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:jayadĂŠjĂŠ|jayadĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:jayadĂŠshĂŠ|jayadĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:jayadĂŠ|jayadĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:jayadathath|jayadathath]] || [[word:jayadajaj|jayadajaj]] || [[word:jayadashash|jayadashash]] || [[word:jayad|jayad]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:jayadatha|jayadatha]] || [[word:jayadaja|jayadaja]] || [[word:jayadasha|jayadasha]] || [[word:jayada|jayada]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:jayadafath|jayadafath]] || [[word:jayadafaj|jayadafaj]] || [[word:jayadafash|jayadafash]] || [[word:jayadaf|jayadaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:jayadasha|jayadasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gojayadasha|gojayadasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokijayadasha|gokijayadasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:jayadnĂŒsha|jayadnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gojayadnknĂŒsha|gojayadnknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokijayadnĂŒsha|gokijayadnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:jayadshĂ«sha|jayadshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojayadnkshĂ«sha|gojayadnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokijayadshĂ«sha|gokijayadshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:jayadrosha|jayadrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojayadnkrosha|gojayadnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokijayadrosha|gokijayadrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:jayadmusha|jayadmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gojayadnkmusha|gojayadnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijayadmusha|gokijayadmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:jayadsherasha|jayadsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gojayadnksherasha|gojayadnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokijayadsherasha|gokijayadsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:jayadngasha|jayadngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gojayadnkngasha|gojayadnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokijayadngasha|gokijayadngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:jayadyasha|jayadyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gojayadnkyasha|gojayadnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokijayadyasha|gokijayadyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:jayadyamasha|jayadyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gojayadnkyamasha|gojayadnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokijayadyamasha|gokijayadyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:jayadnĂŒshĂ«sha|jayadnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gojayadnknĂŒshĂ«sha|gojayadnknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokijayadnĂŒshĂ«sha|gokijayadnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:jayadnĂŒrosha|jayadnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojayadnknĂŒrosha|gojayadnknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokijayadnĂŒrosha|gokijayadnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jayadnĂŒmusha|jayadnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojayadnknĂŒmusha|gojayadnknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijayadnĂŒmusha|gokijayadnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:jayadshĂ«nĂŒsha|jayadshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gojayadnkshĂ«nĂŒsha|gojayadnkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokijayadshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokijayadshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:jayadshĂ«rosha|jayadshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojayadnkshĂ«rosha|gojayadnkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokijayadshĂ«rosha|gokijayadshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jayadshĂ«musha|jayadshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojayadnkshĂ«musha|gojayadnkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijayadshĂ«musha|gokijayadshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:jayadronĂŒsha|jayadronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gojayadnkronĂŒsha|gojayadnkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokijayadronĂŒsha|gokijayadronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:jayadroshĂ«sha|jayadroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gojayadnkroshĂ«sha|gojayadnkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokijayadroshĂ«sha|gokijayadroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jayadromusha|jayadromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojayadnkromusha|gojayadnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijayadromusha|gokijayadromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:jayadmunĂŒsha|jayadmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gojayadnkmunĂŒsha|gojayadnkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokijayadmunĂŒsha|gokijayadmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:jayadmushĂ«sha|jayadmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gojayadnkmushĂ«sha|gojayadnkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokijayadmushĂ«sha|gokijayadmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:jayadmurosha|jayadmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojayadnkmurosha|gojayadnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokijayadmurosha|gokijayadmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:jayad|jayad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:jĂŠyĂŠd|jĂŠyĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hojayad|hojayad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hojĂŠyĂŠd|hojĂŠyĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohojayad|hohojayad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohojĂŠyĂŠd|hohojĂŠyĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒjayad|nĂŒjayad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒjĂŠyĂŠd|nĂŒjĂŠyĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒjayad|nĂŒnĂŒjayad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒjĂŠyĂŠd|nĂŒnĂŒjĂŠyĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻjayad|nĂŻjayad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻjĂŠyĂŠd|nĂŻjĂŠyĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻjayad|nĂŻnĂŻjayad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻjĂŠyĂŠd|nĂŻnĂŻjĂŠyĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lujayad|lujayad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lujĂŠyĂŠd|lujĂŠyĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulujayad|lulujayad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulujĂŠyĂŠd|lulujĂŠyĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lijayad|lijayad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lijĂŠyĂŠd|lijĂŠyĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilijayad|lilijayad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilijĂŠyĂŠd|lilijĂŠyĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kojayad|kojayad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kojĂŠyĂŠd|kojĂŠyĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokojayad|kokojayad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokojĂŠyĂŠd|kokojĂŠyĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kejayad|kejayad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kejĂŠyĂŠd|kejĂŠyĂŠd]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekejayad|kekejayad]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekejĂŠyĂŠd|kekejĂŠyĂŠd]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5390c6a}}
